title: malapoenna ferruginea
intro: Malapoenna ferruginea, also known as Wild Chamomile or Iron Chamomile, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, inflammation, and anxiety due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Malapoenna ferruginea include alleviating menstrual cramps, soothing digestive problems, and promoting relaxation. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be used topically in the form of creams or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
